class.name: ChoiceCallback
class.signature: public class ChoiceCallback extends Object implements Callback, Serializable
class.description: Underlying security services instantiate and pass a ChoiceCallback to the handle method of a CallbackHandler to display a list of choices and to retrieve the selected choice(s).

constructors.name: ChoiceCallback
constructors.signature: public ChoiceCallback(String prompt, String[] choices, int defaultChoice, boolean multipleSelectionsAllowed)
constructors.description: Construct a ChoiceCallback with a prompt, a list of choices, a default choice, and a boolean specifying whether or not multiple selections from the list of choices are allowed.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: the prompt used to describe the list of choices.

parameters.name: choices
parameters.description: the list of choices. The array is cloned to protect against subsequent modification.

parameters.name: defaultChoice
parameters.description: the choice to be used as the default choice when the list of choices are displayed. This value is represented as an index into the choices array.

parameters.name: multipleSelectionsAllowed
parameters.description: boolean specifying whether or not multiple selections can be made from the list of choices.

throws.description: if prompt is null, if prompt has a length of 0, if choices is null, if choices has a length of 0, if any element from choices is null, if any element from choices has a length of 0 or if defaultChoice does not fall within the array boundaries of choices.

methods.name: getChoices
methods.returns: a copy of the list of choices.

methods.name: getDefaultChoice
methods.returns: the defaultChoice, represented as an index into the choices list.

methods.name: allowMultipleSelections
methods.description: Get the boolean determining whether multiple selections from the choices list are allowed.

parameters.name: selection
parameters.description: the selection represented as an index into the choices list.

parameters.name: selections
parameters.description: the selections represented as indexes into the choices list. The array is cloned to protect against subsequent modification.

throws.description: if multiple selections are not allowed, as determined by allowMultipleSelections.

methods.name: getSelectedIndexes
methods.returns: a copy of the selected choices, represented as indexes into the choices list.
